basic_details.job_title: KRIBHCO Accounts Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Krishak Bharati Cooperative Limited (KRIBHCO) Accounts Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of KRIBHCO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KRIBHCO Accounts Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have B.Com, M.Com, CMA, or MBA (Finance) qualifications along with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Accounts Associate vacancies. The email application process for KRIBHCO Accounts Associate Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 24-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification P

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as of 31-03-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: B Com, M. Com, CMA, MBA (Finance)
qualification.details: Accounts Associate: B Com/M. Com/ CMA / MBA (Finance), Minimum 3 years of relevant experience, Strong knowledge of accounting standards, GST and taxation.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KRIBHCO Accounts Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KRIBHCO Accounts Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the KRIBHCO Accounts Associate recruitment is 24th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Accounts Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com, M.Com, CMA, or MBA (Finance) degree to be eligible for the Accounts Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Accounts Associate role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accounts Associate post is 35 years, with the cut-off date for age calculation being 31st March 2026.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the KRIBHCO Accounts Associate job?
faq.answer: You need to send your application via email with all required documents and details before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Accounts Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Accounts Associate position in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. Does KRIBHCO provide salary details in the notification?
faq.answer: The provided data does not include salary details. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific salary information.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the Accounts Associate role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of relevant experience is required for the Accounts Associate position, along with strong knowledge of accounting standards, GST, and taxation.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article once released.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of KRIBHCO?
faq.answer: The official website of KRIBHCO is www.bharattaxiapp.com.
